value_chain_position: Biometric identity verification platform (CLEAR) — occupies the C4ISR/identity layer of the defense-tech value chain for civilian border/access security, and serves TSA-enrolled travelers and stadium/venue access control.
relative_comps: YOU's 27% 3-year CAGR and 46% FCF margin are exceptional — the recurring membership model creates durable cash generation. The defense_tech fit is partial: CLEAR's biometric rails are used in TSA PreCheck and government facilities, giving it a real identity-infrastructure foothold in secure-access scenarios, but it is not a drone/C4ISR/EW player. Vs. IDEX (fingerprint chips) and Thales (government identity systems), CLEAR operates at the consumer-enrollment interface rather than in core government IT. The identity-verification layer is strategically relevant to border/access security spending.
